title: High Jump
excerpt: A High Jump is the vertical branch of the broader jumping rules. It resolves through Strength-based jump distance, movement expenditure, and any nearby terrain or obstacle constraints.
markdown: # High Jump A High Jump is the vertical form of Jumping. Resolve it through the broader Jumping rules, which establish how Strength, movement cost, running start, and landing context shape the leap. If the jump interacts with hazardous footing or constrained landing space, the result can also turn on the creature's remaining Speed and any Difficult Terrain at the destination.
